title: Muhadathah Workbook 1 — Take the Leap to Speak
description: The first in the Conversational Arabic series. Designed to unlock Arabic fluency immediately through bite-sized, practical lessons. Adopted by many Hifth schools across SA.

title: Muhadathah Workbook 2 — Take the Leap to Speak
description: The continuation of the Leap to Speak series. Builds on Book 1 with expanded vocabulary, more complex conversations, and practical real-world scenarios.

title: Hifth Guide — Assisting Your Loved Ones Along Their Hifth Journey
description: A practical guide for parents and family members supporting a Hifth student — written with wisdom, warmth, and years of teaching experience.

title: Hifth Guide — An Educator’s Manual
description: Written for Hifth teachers and madrasah educators. A comprehensive manual covering methodology, student management, and curriculum planning for Hifth programmes.

title: Al-Fiqh Al-Manhajī — The Book of Purification
description: An accessible English-language study of the laws of purification according to the Shāfiʿī school — clearly structured for students new to Islamic jurisprudence.

title: Al-Fiqh Al-Manhajī — The Book of Prayer
description: A clear, structured study of the laws of ṣalāh — covering conditions, pillars, and common questions, written for English-speaking students of Islamic jurisprudence.
